description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for GCP Cloud SQL instances. Covers CPU, memory, disk utilization, network throughput, active connections, and database-engine-specific metrics for both PostgreSQL and MySQL.
title: GCP Cloud SQL Monitoring

2ddefb36-32ac-4574-97b3-e4e314b3c7c8.description: The deployment environment for the service.
2ddefb36-32ac-4574-97b3-e4e314b3c7c8.name: deployment.environment
2ddefb36-32ac-4574-97b3-e4e314b3c7c8.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%cloudsql%'

645d5726-9aca-4a45-9ddf-fee984bd9b77.name: project_id
645d5726-9aca-4a45-9ddf-fee984bd9b77.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'project_id'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%cloudsql%'

0f8ba495-b9f3-4a7c-9f64-bbf43881b1ea.name: database_id
0f8ba495-b9f3-4a7c-9f64-bbf43881b1ea.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'database_id'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%cloudsql%'

widgets.description: High-level Cloud SQL instance metrics
widgets.title: Overview

widgets.description: The fraction of the reserved CPU that is currently in use on the database instance.
widgets.title: CPU Utilization

widgets.description: The fraction of the memory quota that is currently in use on the database instance.
widgets.title: Memory Utilization

widgets.description: The fraction of the disk quota that is currently in use on the database instance.
widgets.title: Disk Utilization

widgets.description: Data utilization in bytes.
widgets.title: Disk Used Bytes

widgets.description: Network throughput metrics for Cloud SQL
widgets.title: Network

widgets.description: Delta count of bytes received through the network on the database server.
widgets.title: Network Bytes Received

widgets.description: Delta count of bytes sent through the network on the database server.
widgets.title: Network Bytes Sent

widgets.description: Number of connections to databases on the Cloud SQL instance.
widgets.title: Active Connections

widgets.description: Metrics specific to Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instances
widgets.title: PostgreSQL Metrics

widgets.description: Number of connections that are active in backends of the PostgreSQL instance.
widgets.title: PostgreSQL Active Backends

widgets.description: Delta count of disk blocks read per second for this database.
widgets.title: PostgreSQL Disk Blocks Read

widgets.description: Delta count of times disk blocks were found already in the buffer cache for this database.
widgets.title: PostgreSQL Buffer Cache Hits

widgets.description: Delta count of transactions in this database that have been committed.
widgets.title: PostgreSQL Transactions Committed

widgets.description: Metrics specific to Cloud SQL MySQL instances
widgets.title: MySQL Metrics

widgets.description: Delta count of statements executed by the MySQL server.
widgets.title: MySQL Queries per Second

widgets.description: Delta count of InnoDB pages read.
widgets.title: MySQL InnoDB Pages Read

widgets.description: Number of seconds the read replica is behind its primary.
widgets.title: MySQL Replication Lag

widgets.description: Replica lag and replication health
widgets.title: Replication

widgets.description: Approximation of the number of bytes the read replica is behind its primary.
widgets.title: Replica Lag
